zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Nightengale Cowper於1519年出生在英國貝德福爾亨洛福時，她的父親William Cowper39歲，母親Lady Margaret Grenville29歲。她於大約1534年與William Tilley在英國英格蘭貝德福爾亨洛福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1582年6月1日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾亨洛福享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾亨洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Nightengale Cowper于1519年出生在英国貝德福爾亨洛福时，她的父亲William Cowper39岁，母亲Lady Margaret Grenville29岁。她于大约1534年与William Tilley在英国英格兰貝德福爾亨洛福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1582年6月1日在英国英格兰貝德福爾亨洛福享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾亨洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Cowper
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English Scottish: variant of   Couper   or   Cooper  .

variants.name: Couper
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Cooper  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Nightengale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nightingale
meanings: English: nickname for someone with a good voice, from Middle English nightegale ‘nightingale’ (Old English nihtegale, from niht ‘night’ + galan ‘sing’). The bird is known as a sweet singer.
Probably an Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Nachtigall  , or cognates in other languages.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Nightengale Cowper was born in 1519, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, her father, William Cowper, was 39 and her mother, Lady Margaret Grenville, was 29. She married William Tilley about 1534, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 1 June 1582, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Nightengale Cowper est née en 1519, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Cowper, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Grenville, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé William Tilley environ 1534, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1582, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Nightengale Cowper 1519 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Cowper 39 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Grenville 29. Sie hat um 1534 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom William Tilley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1582 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Nightengale Cowper è nata il nel 1519 nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, William Cowper, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Grenville, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato William Tilley circa 1534, nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1582, nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Nightengale Cowperが1519年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウで生まれた時，父William Cowperは39歳，母Lady Margaret Grenvilleは29歳であった。約1534年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウでWilliam Tilleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1582年6月1日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Nightengale Cowper(이)가 1519년 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Cowper(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Grenville(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1534년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 William Tilley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 6월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 헨로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Nightengale Cowper nasceu em 1519, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Cowper, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Grenville, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com William Tilley aproximadamente 1534, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1582, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Nightengale Cowper родилась в 1519 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Cowper было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Grenville, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Tilley около 1534 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 1 июня 1582 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Nightengale Cowper nació en 1519, en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Cowper, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Grenville, tenía 29 años. Se casó con William Tilley aproximadamente 1534, en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1582, en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
